heading: Additional authority of Attorney General
label: 3527 Additional authority of Attorney General
text: The Attorney General may enter into such contracts or other agreements as may be necessary to carry out this chapter. Any such contract or agreement which would result in the United States being obligated to make outlays may be entered into only to the extent and in such amount as may be provided in advance in an appropriation Act.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1984section 1210 of Pub. L. 98–473section 3521 of this title
